title: Enterprise Agentic AI Adoption 2026 | Presenc AI
full_text:
Research Enterprise Agentic AI Adoption 2026
Enterprise agentic AI in 2026: 160k+ organisations deployed 400k+ Copilot Studio agents, Salesforce Agentforce 29k deals at $800M ARR, Microsoft 365 Agent 365 GA, plus the broader vendor landscape.
By Ramanath, CTO & Co-Founder at Presenc AI · Last updated: May 2026 Cite This Report
Enterprise agentic AI moved from experimentation to production in 2026. More than 160,000 organisations have deployed over 400,000 Microsoft Copilot Studio agents. Salesforce Agentforce closed 29,000 deals at approximately $800 million ARR. Microsoft 365 E7 and Agent 365 went GA on 1 May 2026. The vendor landscape now spans hyperscalers, application incumbents, frontier labs, and agent-native startups. This page consolidates the adoption data, vendor positioning, and the deployment patterns shaping enterprise agentic ROI.
Key Findings
More than 160,000 organisations have deployed at least one Microsoft Copilot Studio agent by May 2026, with more than 400,000 total agents in production. Microsoft 365 Copilot crossed approximately 12 million paid seats.
Approximately 85 percent of Fortune 500 organisations use at least one Microsoft AI product (Copilot, Copilot Studio, Azure AI, GitHub Copilot, or Agent 365).
Salesforce Agentforce closed approximately 29,000 customer deals through Q1 2026 with approximately $800 million ARR. The product launched in late 2024 and scaled into a major Salesforce revenue line within 18 months.
Microsoft 365 E7 (the new top enterprise tier including unlimited Copilot and Agent 365) and Agent 365 (the standalone agent governance platform) went GA on 1 May 2026.
Agent-native startups (Sierra, Decagon, Cresta, Cognigy, AI21) collectively reached approximately $1.5 billion in combined ARR by May 2026, primarily in customer experience and contact centre verticals.
Enterprise Agentic AI Vendor Landscape
Vendor Flagship Product Deployment Footprint
Microsoft Copilot Studio + Agent 365 160k+ orgs, 400k+ agents
Salesforce Agentforce ~29k customers, $800M ARR
Google Vertex AI Agent Builder + Workspace agents ~12k enterprise customers
ServiceNow Now Assist + AI Agents ~8k customers using AI agents
Oracle OCI Generative AI Agents ~3k Oracle Cloud customers
SAP Joule Embedded in SAP Cloud ERP
Workday Workday AI Embedded in Workday product
Anthropic Claude for Work + Claude Computer Use ~15k enterprise customers
OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise / Edu + custom GPTs / agents ~3M+ ChatGPT Enterprise seats
Sierra CX agent platform ~700 large enterprise customers
Decagon CX support agents ~250 enterprise customers
Cresta Contact centre AI ~100+ enterprise contact centres
Glean Enterprise search + work assistant ~700 enterprise customers
Harvey Legal AI ~350+ law firms and legal teams
Microsoft 365 Agent 365 Detail
Capability Status May 2026
GA date 1 May 2026
M365 E7 tier Launched 1 May 2026
Agent governance Centralised policy, observability, audit
Agent registry Unified across Copilot Studio, custom agents, partner agents
Identity model Workload identity for agents under Entra ID
Compliance Purview integration, DLP, eDiscovery for agent activity
Deployment Pattern Analysis
Use Case Adoption Share (Q1 2026)
Internal knowledge assistant ~78%
Customer-facing support agent ~52%
Sales research and outreach agent ~46%
HR helpdesk agent ~38%
IT helpdesk agent ~44%
Finance back-office agent ~28%
Legal research agent ~22%
Engineering productivity agent ~58%
Marketing content agent ~41%
ROI Patterns
Use Case Median Reported ROI
Customer support agents 3.2x within 12 months
Sales research agents 2.5x within 12 months
Internal knowledge agents 1.8x within 12 months
HR helpdesk agents 2.1x within 12 months
Engineering productivity agents 2.8x within 12 months
Finance back-office agents 1.6x within 12 months
Legal research agents 2.4x within 12 months
Strategic Context
Three structural patterns define the 2026 enterprise agentic AI market. First, hyperscaler concentration: Microsoft, Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Google have captured most of the lighthouse enterprise deployments because their existing application footprint provides distribution that agent-native startups must work to match. Second, governance and identity have become procurement gate items: enterprises now require workload-identity, audit logging, and DLP integration before approving large agent deployments, which favours vendors with mature compliance stacks. Third, the CX vertical is consolidating fastest: customer experience agents are the highest-volume agent category, and a handful of agent-native players (Sierra, Decagon, Cresta) plus the application incumbents have collectively captured most of the deployments.
Brand Visibility Implications
Enterprise agentic AI is one of the highest-traffic procurement research categories in 2026. AI assistant queries about agent platforms, Copilot Studio vs Agentforce, agent governance, and adjacent topics drive sustained procurement-research traffic. Brands selling agent infrastructure, agent observability , agent evaluation, integration tooling, and adjacent products face strong AI-mediated discovery surface for this category.
Methodology
Adoption figures from Microsoft and Salesforce quarterly disclosures, plus reporting from The Information , Bloomberg, and Reuters. ROI patterns aggregated from cross-industry survey data and case study disclosures. Updated quarterly.
How Presenc AI Helps
Presenc AI monitors brand visibility on enterprise agentic AI queries across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity. For agent platform vendors, governance tooling brands, agent observability companies, and integration partners, the platform identifies the prompts driving procurement-research traffic and the gaps where new content unlocks share of voice .
Frequently Asked Questions
How many organisations use enterprise agentic AI in 2026? + More than 160,000 organisations have deployed at least one Microsoft Copilot Studio agent by May 2026. Salesforce Agentforce reached approximately 29,000 customer deals. Approximately 85 percent of Fortune 500 organisations use at least one Microsoft AI product.
What is Agent 365? + Microsoft\u2019s standalone agent governance platform, GA on 1 May 2026, that provides centralised policy, observability, audit, and Entra ID workload-identity management for agents across Copilot Studio, custom-built, and partner agents. Agent 365 is included in the M365 E7 tier launched the same day.
How much is Salesforce Agentforce worth? + Approximately $800 million ARR through Q1 2026 across approximately 29,000 customer deals. The product launched in late 2024 and scaled into a major Salesforce revenue line within 18 months.
What is the typical agent ROI? + Median reported ROI within 12 months is 3.2x for customer support agents, 2.8x for engineering productivity agents, 2.5x for sales research agents, 2.4x for legal research agents, and 1.6 to 2.1x for back-office and helpdesk agents. ROI is most reliable in high-volume routine workflows.
Which agent platforms compete with Microsoft and Salesforce? + Google Vertex AI Agent Builder, ServiceNow Now Assist, Oracle OCI Generative AI Agents, SAP Joule, and Workday AI on the application incumbent side. Anthropic Claude for Work, OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, Sierra, Decagon, Cresta, Glean, and Harvey on the AI-native side.
Track Your AI Visibility
See how your brand appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and other AI platforms. Start monitoring today.
Start Free Trial
